message:
fix(security): enforce default-deny in FcpConnector::simulate() [MOR/C3.5]

Change the default simulate() implementation from returning
SimulateResponse::allowed to SimulateResponse::denied with code
FCP-3010. This fixes a direct violation of the default-deny principle:
connectors that did not override simulate() were silently claiming
all operations would succeed.

Also fixes pre-existing compile/clippy issues in CapabilityToken
phantom type code (from_raw, verify ref API, const fn, # Panics doc)
and policy.rs raw field accessor.

4 new tests: default_simulate_returns_denied,
default_simulate_denied_includes_reason_code,
override_simulate_returns_allowed_for_known_op,
override_simulate_denies_unknown_op.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
